# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs: 
# The name of the job is used as a unique identifier in your GitHub Actions workflow and logs location
   custom-build:    # Job Name should be descriptive not to clutter git log outputs. Unique for each build session    
       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
      if: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags') }} 
        env:                 
           DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENTS : "prod"    # You may define any environments here you want to build and deploy (e.g., prod or dev)  
       steps:                   
          - name: Checkout code    
            uses: actions/checkout@v2 
           with:                            
              fetch-depth: '0'            
              
         # Here write your custom builds commands such as cmake, make etc. for the projects that you want to build from source  
          - name : "Build project"                          
            run: |      
                echo ${{ runner.os }}          
		# Insert building process here            
              -- You may use tools like CMake or Make                     # For example,  if your Project is a .NET Core application then you would do the following   
          - name : "Deploy to production environment"                  
            run: |                           
                echo ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENTS }}        		            		# Prints DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENTS defined in .github/workflow file                    			 	 				  					    - You can then use this to trigger your deployment commands          								     
        # Write Deployment command here for Production enviornment if needed.      		             	    	    }           	}                                     }}                             ]              |]}}                  []}                            )                      ^]]                    [[]  (                     '    ()')))          ''')}})'''))                 -(*(*'(('((**/*/(`
